handbook.page_description: Step-by-step guides from first setup to daily agent work. Private by default — only agents see this handbook unless you mark a guide public.
handbook.agents_only_notice: These guides are for agents and admins. Customers do not see them unless you turn on Public on portal for a specific guide.
handbook.system_article_public_hint: Private by default. Turn on only if customers should see this guide on the portal.
handbook.collection_visibility_locked: The handbook collection stays agents-only. Use Public on portal on each guide in How to use helpefi to share with customers.
handbook.empty_state: Handbook articles are being prepared. Run the platform handbook seeder or contact your administrator.
